items.bullet: Saline Township Board meets July 14 at 7 PM to consider an IFEC application.
Saline trustees consider tax exemption application July 8 for Related Digital data center project.
Ypsilanti Township seeks 12-month water/sewer moratorium on 144-acre U-M/Los Alamos site that could draw up to 5 million gallons daily while remaining tax-exempt.
Ypsilanti Twp secured 12-month water/sewer moratorium for U-M/LANL facility on 144 acres bought for $6.7M.
